enrichment.short_description: Glean is an enterprise Work AI platform that unifies company data and apps to power permission-aware search, AI agents, and automation.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Glean unifies enterprise data and apps into a Work AI platform for permission-aware search, AI agents, and automation.

features.title: Knowledge Connection
features.description: Integrates across enterprise apps and systems such as Slack, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint, GitHub, and Salesforce.

features.title: AI Agents
features.description: Lets teams build and deploy AI agents to automate workflows.

features.title: Permission-Aware Search
features.description: Provides enterprise search that respects each user's existing access permissions.

features.title: Workflow Automation
features.description: Automates recurring tasks and processes across departments.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Backed by SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance with full observability.

features.title: Multi-LLM Support
features.description: Works with 35+ different large language models rather than a single provider.

pros: Connects to a wide range of enterprise systems, including Slack, Salesforce, GitHub, and SharePoint
Permission-aware search preserves each user's existing access controls
Supports 35+ LLMs instead of locking customers into one model provider
Extensive compliance certifications, including SOC 2, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, HIPAA, and GDPR
cons: No public pricing; requires a sales demo to get a quote
No published free trial or free plan
Enterprise-focused positioning may be more than smaller teams need

faqs.question: Does Glean publish its pricing?
faqs.answer: No, Glean does not list public prices; you need to request a demo for a quote.

faqs.question: What systems does Glean connect to?
faqs.answer: Glean integrates with apps such as Slack, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint, GitHub, and Salesforce.

faqs.question: Can teams build custom AI agents in Glean?
faqs.answer: Yes, Glean lets teams build and deploy their own AI agents for automation.

faqs.question: Is Glean secure enough for enterprise data?
faqs.answer: Yes, Glean holds SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance.

faqs.question: How many LLMs does Glean support?
faqs.answer: Glean states it supports 35+ unique LLMs.

use_cases.title: Enterprise knowledge search
use_cases.description: Employees search across connected apps and documents with results limited to what they are permitted to see.

use_cases.title: AI agent automation
use_cases.description: Teams build AI agents on Glean to automate recurring cross-app workflows.

use_cases.title: Departmental self-serve support
use_cases.description: Support, HR, and sales teams get instant answers pulled from internal knowledge sources.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Glean?
paragraphs: Glean is a Work AI platform that connects an organization's apps and data sources so employees can search, build AI agents, and automate workflows without losing existing permission controls.
The platform integrates with tools such as Slack, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint, GitHub, and Salesforce, and supports more than 35 different LLMs.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Glean is for
paragraphs: Glean targets enterprise organizations that need centralized, permission-aware search and AI automation across many internal systems, including engineering, sales, support, and HR teams.

enrichment.short_description: WriterZen is an SEO content platform for keyword research, topic clustering, and GPT-4o mini-assisted writing, sold with one-time pricing.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WriterZen offers SEO keyword research, topic clustering, and a GPT-4o mini AI writer with one-time, no-subscription pricing.

features.title: Topic Discovery
features.description: Generates clustered topics from seed keywords for content planning.

features.title: Keyword Explorer
features.description: Analyzes keyword data pulled from Google's search database.

features.title: Keyword Planner
features.description: Organizes and clusters keywords into a content strategy.

features.title: Content Creator
features.description: Builds article outlines from SERPs, Reddit, and Google Suggest results.

features.title: AI Assistant
features.description: GPT-4o mini-powered writing, rewriting, and paraphrasing tool.

features.title: Plagiarism Checker
features.description: Verifies the originality of generated and edited content.

features.title: Team Function
features.description: Manages team projects and shared content workflows.

features.title: Domain Analysis
features.description: Surfaces competitive keyword and content insights.

pros: One-time lifetime pricing with no recurring subscription fees
Combines keyword research and AI writing in a single workflow
21-day money-back guarantee on purchases
Rated 4.7-4.8/5 across G2, Trustpilot, and Capterra
cons: Credit-based system means extra keyword/NLP credits must be purchased once included credits run out
Additional team seats cost $9/seat/month on top of the one-time price
No free plan or free trial mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Is WriterZen a subscription?
faqs.answer: No, WriterZen sells one-time lifetime licenses rather than monthly subscriptions.

faqs.question: What AI model powers WriterZen's writing assistant?
faqs.answer: WriterZen's AI Assistant is powered by GPT-4o mini.

faqs.question: Can teams collaborate in WriterZen?
faqs.answer: Yes, additional member seats can be added for $9/seat/month.

faqs.question: Does WriterZen offer refunds?
faqs.answer: Yes, WriterZen offers a 21-day money-back guarantee.

use_cases.title: SEO content planning
use_cases.description: SEO teams research and cluster keywords into topics before assigning articles.

use_cases.title: Scaled content production
use_cases.description: Marketing teams generate outlines and AI-assisted drafts from SERP and keyword data.

use_cases.title: Freelance content research
use_cases.description: Solo writers use keyword and domain analysis to find content opportunities.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WriterZen?
paragraphs: WriterZen is an SEO content workflow tool that combines keyword research, topic clustering, and AI-assisted writing so teams can plan and produce content designed to rank in Google.
It pulls keyword data from Google's search database and builds article outlines from SERPs, Reddit, and Google Suggest, with a GPT-4o mini writing assistant to draft and rewrite copy.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WriterZen is for
paragraphs: WriterZen suits SEO professionals, agencies, and marketing teams who want keyword research and AI writing in one tool, paid for with a one-time fee instead of a recurring subscription.

enrichment.short_description: Koala AI generates SEO-optimized articles using GPT-5 and Claude models, with deep research, internal linking, and direct CMS publishing.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Koala AI writes SEO articles with GPT-5 and Claude, offering deep research, automatic internal linking, and 1-click CMS publishing.

features.title: Deep Research Mode
features.description: Analyzes far more source context to produce factual, well-cited articles.

features.title: Real-Time SERP Analysis
features.description: Examines top-ranking content to identify entities and semantic keywords.

features.title: Automatic Internal Linking
features.description: Adds contextual internal links across a site automatically.

features.title: Amazon Affiliate Articles
features.description: Generates product review articles with live pricing and specs.

features.title: 1-Click Publishing
features.description: Publishes directly to WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Ghost.

features.title: Polish (AI Editing)
features.description: One-click editing pass for readability and formatting.

features.title: Outline Editor
features.description: Lets users customize article structure before generation.

features.title: Bulk Content Creation
features.description: Generates multiple articles simultaneously.

pros: Direct one-click publishing to WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Ghost
Uses current-generation models including GPT-5 and Claude 4
Deep Research mode aims to cite sources for factual accuracy
Transparent, tiered per-word pricing
cons: Higher-volume plans get expensive, up to $2,000/month
Using premium models like GPT-5.2 or Claude 4.5 Sonnet consumes word quota at double the rate
Free trial is limited to 5,000 words and 25 chat messages

faqs.question: Does Koala AI offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, new users get 5,000 words and 25 chat messages free, with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Which AI models does Koala AI use?
faqs.answer: Koala AI uses GPT-5 and Claude 4 models for content generation.

faqs.question: Can Koala AI publish directly to my site?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers 1-click publishing to WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Ghost.

faqs.question: What is Deep Research Mode?
faqs.answer: It analyzes significantly more source context to produce factual, well-cited articles.

use_cases.title: SEO content scaling
use_cases.description: Content teams generate large volumes of SEO-optimized articles with automatic internal linking.

use_cases.title: Amazon affiliate content
use_cases.description: Affiliate marketers generate product review articles with live pricing and specs.

use_cases.title: Agency content production
use_cases.description: Agencies bulk-generate and publish client articles directly to CMS platforms.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Koala AI?
paragraphs: Koala AI is a content creation platform that uses GPT-5 and Claude models to generate SEO-optimized, publish-ready articles, with a Deep Research mode intended to produce factual, well-cited content.
It can publish directly to WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Ghost, add internal links automatically, and generate Amazon affiliate product reviews with live pricing.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Koala AI is for
paragraphs: Koala AI is built for content creators, SEO professionals, publishers, and agencies who need to produce and publish large volumes of articles directly to their CMS.

enrichment.short_description: Hypotenuse AI is a product experience management platform that enriches ecommerce product data and auto-generates SEO descriptions and imagery.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Hypotenuse AI enriches ecommerce product data and generates SEO descriptions, images, and translations for enterprise retailers.

features.title: Product Data Enrichment
features.description: Automatically fills in missing attributes and standardizes product data.

features.title: AI Product Descriptions
features.description: Generates SEO-optimized titles and descriptions in a brand's voice.

features.title: Product Tagging & Categorization
features.description: Applies consistent tags aligned with Google or Amazon taxonomies.

features.title: AI Image Enhancement
features.description: Standardizes images, adjusts backgrounds, and increases resolution.

features.title: Digital Asset Management
features.description: Organizes and edits product imagery in one place.

features.title: AI Product Photography
features.description: Generates product shots without a physical photoshoot.

features.title: Brand Voice Enforcement
features.description: Applies custom brand guidelines and formatting rules.

features.title: Translation & Localization
features.description: Supports multi-language product content creation.

pros: Integrates with major marketplaces (Amazon, Walmart, Target) and PIM/commerce platforms (Shopify, Salsify, NetSuite, Akeneo, BigCommerce, WooCommerce)
Y Combinator-backed with a claimed 500,000+ users
Free trial available with no credit card required
SOC 2 compliant with granular access controls
cons: No public pricing; both plans require contacting sales for a quote
Basic plan is capped at fewer than 100 products, pushing larger catalogs to custom Enterprise pricing
Enterprise-oriented positioning may not suit very small merchants

faqs.question: Does Hypotenuse AI publish its prices?
faqs.answer: No, both the Basic and Ecommerce Enterprise plans require contacting sales for a custom quote.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, Hypotenuse AI offers a free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What platforms does it integrate with?
faqs.answer: It integrates with marketplaces like Amazon, Walmart, and Target, and platforms like Shopify, Salsify, NetSuite, Akeneo, BigCommerce, and WooCommerce.

faqs.question: Can it generate product images?
faqs.answer: Yes, its AI Image Enhancement and AI Product Photography features can standardize, edit, and generate product imagery.

use_cases.title: Bulk product data enrichment
use_cases.description: Retailers with large catalogs fill in missing attributes and standardize product data automatically.

use_cases.title: SEO product content at scale
use_cases.description: Teams generate SEO-optimized titles and descriptions across thousands of SKUs in a consistent brand voice.

use_cases.title: Multi-marketplace listing management
use_cases.description: Brands maintain consistent tagging and categorization across Amazon, Walmart, and their own site.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Hypotenuse AI?
paragraphs: Hypotenuse AI is a product experience management (PXM) platform that enriches ecommerce product data and generates SEO-optimized descriptions, tags, and images at scale.
It integrates with marketplaces such as Amazon, Walmart, and Target, and commerce platforms like Shopify, Salsify, NetSuite, and BigCommerce, to keep product content consistent across channels.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Hypotenuse AI is for
paragraphs: The platform targets enterprise ecommerce teams and larger retailers managing large or multi-channel product catalogs, rather than small single-store merchants.

enrichment.short_description: ParagraphAI is an AI writing assistant that drafts, corrects, and translates text via a mobile keyboard, browser extension, and apps.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: ParagraphAI is an AI writing assistant with grammar fixes, replies, and translation across 40+ languages on mobile and browser.

features.title: Grammar Correction
features.description: Fixes messages instantly with single-tap corrections.

features.title: Email Replies
features.description: Drafts responses to messages with one tap.

features.title: Content Creation
features.description: Generates emails, reports, and articles.

features.title: Real-Time Editing
features.description: Adjusts formality, friendliness, length, and tone of a message.

features.title: Translation
features.description: Supports 40+ languages for input and output.

features.title: AI Humanization
features.description: Makes AI-generated content sound more natural.

features.title: Templates
features.description: Streamlines repetitive writing tasks.

features.title: Summarization
features.description: Condenses web pages and PDFs.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required
Works across mobile keyboard, browser extension, and apps with cross-device sync
Supports 40+ languages for translation
Annual Pro billing cuts the monthly price roughly in half
cons: Free plan limited to 5 daily uses of Create/Fix/Reply/Edit and a 1,000 character input limit
Enterprise features like brand voice and dedicated support require custom/quote pricing
Monthly Pro plan ($24.99/user) costs double the annual per-month rate

faqs.question: Is there a free version of ParagraphAI?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan allows 5 daily uses with a 1,000 character input limit.

faqs.question: How much does Pro cost?
faqs.answer: Pro is $24.99/user/month billed monthly, or $12.49/user/month billed annually.

faqs.question: What platforms does ParagraphAI support?
faqs.answer: It's available as a Chrome browser extension and as iOS and Android mobile apps.

faqs.question: How many languages does ParagraphAI support?
faqs.answer: It supports writing and translation in 40+ languages.

use_cases.title: Everyday writing assistance
use_cases.description: Professionals fix grammar and draft replies to emails and messages from any app.

use_cases.title: Accessible writing support
use_cases.description: Users with dyslexia or who are ESL learners get help composing clear text.
use_cases.audience: ESL learners and people with dyslexia

use_cases.title: Enterprise brand communications
use_cases.description: Enterprise teams apply a custom brand voice with dedicated account support.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ParagraphAI?
paragraphs: ParagraphAI is an AI writing assistant that helps users draft, correct, and reply to messages from a mobile keyboard, browser extension, or app, with real-time tone and formality adjustments.
It supports 40+ languages for translation and includes summarization for web pages and PDFs, plus an AI humanization feature for AI-generated text.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ParagraphAI is for
paragraphs: ParagraphAI targets students, professionals, ESL learners, and people with dyslexia who want writing help built into their existing keyboard and browser, with an Enterprise tier for teams needing brand voice controls.

enrichment.short_description: Simplified is an AI marketing platform where the Riley agent plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns across social channels.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Simplified uses its Riley AI agent to plan, create, and publish marketing campaigns with brand kits and multi-channel scheduling.

features.title: AI Agent (Riley)
features.description: Plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns end-to-end.

features.title: Creative Tools
features.description: AI-powered design, writing, video, ad, and presentation creation.

features.title: Brand Kit
features.description: Stores brand guidelines, voice, colors, fonts, products, and approved examples.

features.title: Approval Gates
features.description: Shows review status and ownership before content is published.

features.title: Social Management
features.description: Provides a shared calendar, inbox, and analytics across channels.

features.title: Scheduling & Publishing
features.description: Publishes natively to 10+ social and ad channels, including TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube.

features.title: Developer Access
features.description: Offers an MCP server, CLI, API/webhooks, REST, and OAuth2 for custom integrations.

pros: Riley agent automates end-to-end campaign planning, creation, and publishing
Publishes natively to 10+ channels including TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, and YouTube
Developer access via MCP server, CLI, API/webhooks, and OAuth2
Free trial of the Starter plan available with no credit card required
cons: Starter plan's monthly price ($59) is cheaper than its annual per-month price ($79), an unusual pricing structure worth double-checking before purchase
Multi-seat collaboration only becomes available starting on the Pro plan
Extra campaigns beyond a plan's monthly limit cost $10 each

faqs.question: Is there a free trial of Simplified?
faqs.answer: Yes, Simplified offers a trial with full Starter-plan access (5 campaigns, 100K AI words, 100 AI designs) with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What does the Riley AI agent do?
faqs.answer: Riley plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns end-to-end, adjusting output based on approvals and feedback.

faqs.question: Which channels can Simplified publish to?
faqs.answer: Simplified publishes to 10+ channels including TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube.

faqs.question: Does Simplified offer an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers an MCP server, CLI, REST API/webhooks, and OAuth2 for developers.

faqs.question: What happens if I use more campaigns than my plan allows?
faqs.answer: Additional campaigns can be purchased for $10 each on any plan.

use_cases.title: Lean team campaign automation
use_cases.description: Founders and small marketing teams let Riley plan and publish full campaigns without a large team.

use_cases.title: Agency client management
use_cases.description: Agencies manage brand kits and approvals for multiple clients from one workspace.

use_cases.title: Custom AI agent workflows
use_cases.description: Technical teams connect their own AI agents (e.g. Claude, Codex, Cursor) via Simplified's API and MCP server.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Simplified?
paragraphs: Simplified is an AI marketing platform built around Riley, an AI agent that plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns end-to-end using a stored brand kit and approval workflow.
It includes creative tools for design, writing, video, and ads, plus social scheduling and analytics across 10+ channels, with API, CLI, and MCP server access for developers.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Simplified is for
paragraphs: Simplified serves founders and lean marketing teams, agencies managing multiple clients, and technical teams that want to connect their own AI agents to a marketing workflow.

enrichment.short_description: AI academic writing assistant that autocompletes text and links every claim to a traceable source citation.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Jenni AI helps researchers and students write cited papers faster with AI autocomplete, source-linked claims, and 10,000+ citation styles.

features.title: AI Autocomplete
features.description: Suggests text grounded in your uploaded papers, with citations added automatically as you write.

features.title: Traceable citations
features.description: Every AI-generated claim links back to the exact page and paragraph in the source PDF.

features.title: Reference import
features.description: Import existing libraries from Zotero or Mendeley, or search over 200 million papers directly in the app.

features.title: 10,000+ citation styles
features.description: Formats references in APA 7th, Chicago, Harvard, and thousands of other citation styles.

features.title: Reviews
features.description: Scans a draft's claims and flags statements that are unverified or contradicted by the cited sources.

features.title: Research Chat
features.description: Ask questions across an entire uploaded library and get answers with citations attached.

features.title: Real-time collaboration
features.description: Co-author documents with comments and version history.

pros: Free tier available with no credit card required
Citations are traceable to the exact source page, reducing fabricated references
Supports 10,000+ citation styles including APA, Chicago, and Harvard
Direct import from Zotero and Mendeley reference libraries
cons: No stated support for non-English writing on the site
No mobile app mentioned
Higher usage limits (unlimited autocomplete, edits, chat) require the $29/month Pro plan
No team or enterprise plan is advertised on the pricing page

faqs.question: Is there a free plan for Jenni AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jenni offers a free plan with 10 AI autocompletes per day, 10 PDF uploads, and limited AI edits, chat, and reviews, with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What citation styles does Jenni support?
faqs.answer: Jenni supports over 10,000 citation styles, including APA 7th edition, Chicago, and Harvard.

faqs.question: Can I import my existing reference library?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jenni lets you import references from Zotero or Mendeley, or search over 200 million papers directly.

faqs.question: How much does Jenni AI cost?
faqs.answer: Jenni has a free plan, a Plus plan at $12/month, and a Pro plan at $29/month, each billed monthly with annual discounts available.

faqs.question: Does Jenni check facts in my writing?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Reviews feature analyzes claims in a draft and flags statements that are unverified or contradicted by cited sources.

use_cases.title: Writing cited research papers
use_cases.description: Graduate students and PhD candidates draft papers with AI autocomplete that automatically cites uploaded source material.

use_cases.title: Literature review at scale
use_cases.description: Research labs use Research Chat to query an entire library of uploaded papers and get sourced answers.

use_cases.title: Compliant, cited reporting
use_cases.description: Policy analysts and pharma teams produce documents where every claim must trace back to a verifiable source.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Jenni AI?
paragraphs: Jenni AI is an AI writing assistant built for academic and research writing. It generates AI autocomplete suggestions grounded in a user's uploaded papers, and links every AI-assisted claim back to the exact page and paragraph of its source.
Beyond drafting, Jenni supports reference management with imports from Zotero and Mendeley, a search index of over 200 million papers, and formatting across more than 10,000 citation styles.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Jenni AI is for
paragraphs: Jenni is built for graduate students, PhD candidates, university researchers, and professionals in fields like pharma and policy analysis who need writing that is both fast and fully cited to source material.

enrichment.short_description: AI content writing tool that generates SEO-optimized blog posts, marketing copy, and images using GPT-4o.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WordHero is an AI writing tool that generates blog posts, marketing copy, and images in 108 languages using GPT-4o, used by 30,000+ businesses.

features.title: Brand voice customization

features.title: SEO keyword assistant

features.title: WordHero Art

features.title: Long-form editor

features.title: AI chat with wizard mode
features.description: Interactive chat interface that guides content creation step by step.

features.title: 108-language content generation
features.description: Can generate written content in 108 languages.

pros: Backed by a 14-day money-back guarantee
Used by a large base of over 30,000 business owners, marketers, and writers
Supports content generation in 108 languages
Includes built-in AI image generation (WordHero Art)

Infinity plan's listed monthly price ($99) is a discount from a stated $199, so pricing may vary over time
No team or enterprise plan is described on the pricing page

faqs.question: Does WordHero have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, WordHero does not offer a free plan, but it provides a 14-day money-back guarantee on paid plans.

faqs.question: How much does WordHero cost?
faqs.answer: The Creator plan is $49/month (or $29/month billed annually) and the Infinity plan is $99/month (or $79/month billed annually).

faqs.question: What AI models power WordHero?
faqs.answer: WordHero uses GPT-4o and GPT-4o mini alongside proprietary AI technology.

faqs.question: How many languages does WordHero support?
faqs.answer: WordHero can generate content in 108 languages.

use_cases.title: Blog content production
use_cases.description: Marketers and business owners generate SEO-oriented blog posts with one-click generation and a keyword assistant.

use_cases.title: Multilingual content creation
use_cases.description: Content teams produce written material in 108 supported languages for international audiences.

use_cases.title: Brand-voice copywriting
use_cases.description: Writers customize the AI's brand voice to keep marketing copy consistent across pieces.

features: Same features as monthly Creator plan
Enhanced Mode with advanced AI models
Same features as monthly Infinity plan

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WordHero?
paragraphs: WordHero is an AI writing platform focused on generating blog posts and marketing content quickly, using GPT-4o and GPT-4o mini alongside its own AI technology.
The platform includes an SEO keyword assistant, a long-form editor, brand voice customization, an AI image generator called WordHero Art, and support for generating content in 108 languages.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WordHero is for
paragraphs: WordHero is aimed at business owners, marketers, writers, and content creators who need to produce blog and marketing content at volume, including in languages beyond English.

enrichment.short_description: AI writing assistant that turns notes into outlines and full drafts for essays, blogs, and other long-form content.

features.title: Luna AI drafting

features.title: Smart Chat

features.title: Content Cluster

features.title: Templates
features.description: Includes templates for blog posts, essays, technical guides, newsletters, and Twitter threads.

features.title: Collaboration Mode
features.description: Allows teams to edit documents together.

pros: 30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
GPT-4-powered Smart Chat gives real-time editing feedback
Custom Style Generator can match a specific voice or tone
Ready-made templates for multiple content formats

faqs.question: Does Moonbeam have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Moonbeam does not offer a permanent free plan; it offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on the Pro plan instead.

faqs.question: How much does Moonbeam cost?
faqs.answer: The Pro plan is $49/month billed yearly, and the Team plan is $99/month per user, billed monthly.

faqs.question: What AI model powers Moonbeam's chat feature?
faqs.answer: Smart Chat is powered by GPT-4.

faqs.question: Can teams collaborate in Moonbeam?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Team plan adds collaborative real-time editing and support for multiple users.

use_cases.title: Long-form essay writing
use_cases.description: Students and writers use the Wizard and Luna AI to turn notes into structured drafts.

use_cases.title: Blog and content production
use_cases.description: Content creators use templates and Content Cluster to plan and draft multiple articles.

use_cases.title: Team content collaboration
use_cases.description: Teams use Collaboration Mode on the Team plan to co-edit long-form documents.

features: Boss Mode, Moonbeam Chat, Ask Luna

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Moonbeam?
paragraphs: Moonbeam is an AI writing assistant focused on long-form content such as essays, blog posts, and technical guides. Its Wizard tool converts notes into outlines and paragraphs, while Luna AI can generate first drafts from a simple prompt.
A GPT-4-powered Smart Chat gives real-time feedback and editing suggestions, and the Custom Style Generator can rewrite content to match a chosen voice or tone.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Moonbeam is for
paragraphs: Moonbeam targets writers, students, content creators, and freelancers who need help structuring and drafting long-form written work, with a Team plan for collaborative content teams.

enrichment.short_description: AI writing extension that autocompletes sentences and emails directly in the browser to speed up typing.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Compose AI is a free Chrome extension that autocompletes emails and documents as you type, learning your personal writing voice.

features.title: Autocomplete
features.description: Suggests sentence completions as you type across supported platforms.

features.title: Personalization
features.description: Learns a user's writing 'voice' and suggests personalized phrases over time.

features.title: Tool integration
features.description: Integrates with a user's existing platforms and tools rather than requiring a separate app.

features.title: Chrome extension
features.description: Runs as a free Chrome browser plugin.

pros: Core autocomplete plugin is free to use forever
Learns and adapts to a user's personal writing style over time
Works inline across existing tools instead of a separate writing app
cons: Premium plan pricing is not publicly disclosed on the site
Only available as a Chrome browser extension, with no other platforms mentioned

long_form_blocks.heading: What is D-ID?

paragraphs: Cleanvoice is an AI-powered audio and video editing tool built for podcast production. It automatically removes filler words, background noise, mouth sounds, and long silences from recordings, and adds transcription and episode summaries.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Cleanvoice is for

paragraphs: Common Room is a go-to-market platform that unifies CRM, product, and marketing data with external buyer signals into a single view of each prospect.
Its RoomieAI agents handle account and contact research and message personalization, while Person360 provides waterfall enrichment across a stated 400M+ contact directory.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Common Room is for
paragraphs: Common Room targets SDRs, account executives, RevOps, and ABM teams that need unified buyer intelligence across CRM and marketing systems.

enrichment.short_description: Sales intelligence platform that flags buying signals like job changes and uses an AI agent (Gem-E) to score and prioritize prospects.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: UserGems: AI-driven signal tracking and Gem-E scoring to prioritize outbound and ABM prospects.

features.title: Signals
features.description: Captures 30+ native buying signals including job changes, contact-level intent, website visits, M&A activity, and hiring data.

features.title: Gem-E
features.description: AI agent that analyzes 600+ signals and learns from closed-won patterns to build a customizable scoring model.

features.title: Orchestration
features.description: Coordinates outreach, ads, and CRM updates across sales and marketing channels simultaneously.

features.title: Research Agent
features.description: Discovers custom signals beyond native integrations.

features.title: CRM/sales-tool integration
features.description: Works within Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, and Salesloft.

pros: Gem-E's scoring model is described as transparent and customizable rather than a black box.
Tracks 30+ native buying signals, including job changes and M&A activity, without custom setup.
Offers a money-back guarantee tied to revenue generated from spend.
Integrates directly with major CRM and sales engagement tools.
cons: Entry-level Core plan starts at $2,750/month ($33,000/year) plus a one-time implementation fee.
Several capabilities (intent signals, research agent, de-anonymization) are add-ons on lower tiers.
No free plan; pricing is enterprise-oriented.
Founding year and company size are not disclosed on the site.

faqs.question: What is Gem-E?
faqs.answer: Gem-E is UserGems' AI agent that analyzes signals and learns from closed-won deals to score and prioritize prospects.

faqs.question: How much does UserGems cost?
faqs.answer: The Core plan starts at $2,750/month ($33,000/year); Advanced and Elite tiers cost $5,750/month and $10,000/month respectively.

faqs.question: Is there a smaller plan for startups?
faqs.answer: Yes, a Starter Package is available for companies under 80 employees, priced on request.

faqs.question: What signals does UserGems track?
faqs.answer: 30+ signals including job changes, intent data, website visits, M&A activity, and hiring changes.

use_cases.title: Champion job-change tracking
use_cases.description: Alerts reps when a past buyer or champion moves to a new company.

use_cases.title: Signal-based ABM orchestration
use_cases.description: Coordinates outreach and ads across sales and marketing channels using buying signals.

use_cases.title: Pipeline prioritization
use_cases.description: Scores prospects using Gem-E's closed-won-based model.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is UserGems?
paragraphs: UserGems is a sales intelligence platform that tracks buying signals, such as job changes, intent data, and M&A activity, to help outbound and ABM teams find warm prospects.
Its Gem-E AI agent analyzes signals against closed-won patterns to build a customizable scoring model, then helps orchestrate outreach across sales and marketing channels.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who UserGems is for
paragraphs: UserGems is built for enterprise sales, ABM, and RevOps teams running outbound and account-based programs on top of Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, or Salesloft.

enrichment.short_description: Identifies website visitors at the person level and engages them via an AI chatbot, popups, and ad retargeting.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Warmly: person-level website visitor identification with AI chat, intent scoring, and ad retargeting.

pros: Combines website de-anonymization, AI chat, and ad retargeting in one platform.
TAM Agent adds ML-based intent scoring and automated buying-committee mapping.
Accessible via app, API, and MCP for custom workflows.
Reports a 4.8/5 rating from 200+ reviews (per the vendor's own site).
cons: Plans are priced from $10,000 to $30,000/year, with no published free tier.
Full autopilot capabilities are reserved for the top AI Inbound Autopilot plan.
Add-ons like the GTM Signals Package and Warm Experiences cost extra ($10,000/year each).
Founding year, headquarters, and company size are not disclosed on the site.

faqs.question: What does Warmly's Inbound Agent do?
faqs.answer: It identifies website visitors at the person level and engages them via an AI chatbot, smart popups, and retargeting.

faqs.question: How much does Warmly cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $10,000/year for AI Web-Deanonymization, up to $30,000/year for AI Inbound Autopilot; quarterly billing is also available.

faqs.question: Can Warmly identify who visits my site?
faqs.answer: Yes, its core capability is person-level website visitor identification.

faqs.question: Does Warmly have an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, the platform is accessible via app, API, and MCP.

features: AI chatbot with 1 AI Studio Agent

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Warmly?
paragraphs: Warmly is a B2B go-to-market platform that identifies website visitors at the person level and engages them through an AI chatbot, popups, and retargeting.
Its TAM Agent extends this with AI-driven account tiering, intent scoring, and buying-committee identification, fed by a shared Context Graph of site, email, and meeting data.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Warmly is for
paragraphs: Warmly is aimed at marketing, SDR, and RevOps teams that want to convert anonymous website traffic into identified, engaged pipeline.

enrichment.short_description: Go-to-market data platform combining waterfall enrichment from 200+ providers with AI research agents (Claygents).

Usage-based pricing (actions/data credits) scales incrementally rather than jumping straight to enterprise tiers.
cons: Free plan caps tables at 200 rows, well below paid tiers.
CRM auto-sync, webhook automation, and ad audience sync require the Growth plan or above.
Enterprise features (SSO, RBAC, data warehouse integrations) require a custom annual contract.
Founding year, headquarters, and company size are not disclosed on the pages reviewed.

faqs.question: Does Clay have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes 500 actions/month, 100 data credits/month, and unlimited seats and tables (up to 200 rows per table).

faqs.question: What are Claygents?
faqs.answer: Claygents are Clay's AI research agents that gather company and people data from the web.

faqs.question: How is Clay priced?
faqs.answer: Clay uses tiered plans (Free, Launch, Growth, Enterprise) plus usage-based actions and data credits; Launch starts around $167/month.

faqs.question: Can Clay sync data to ad platforms?
faqs.answer: Yes, its Audiences feature syncs first- and third-party data to LinkedIn, Meta, and Google Ads.

faqs.question: Does Clay offer a trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day Pro trial is offered with no credit card required.

use_cases.title: Prospect enrichment

use_cases.title: AI-assisted account research

use_cases.title: CRM hygiene
use_cases.description: Continuously refreshes and enriches CRM records.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Clay?
paragraphs: Clay is a go-to-market data platform that combines waterfall enrichment across 200+ data providers with AI research agents (Claygents) for prospecting and account research.
It also includes a native email sequencer, intent-signal tracking, and audience syncing to ad platforms like LinkedIn, Meta, and Google.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Clay is for
paragraphs: Clay serves GTM operations, SDRs, and marketing teams who want custom enrichment and outreach workflows on usage-based pricing rather than a single fixed data source.

cons: Higher-tier plans (Email + Phone) run up to $199/month per user on monthly billing.
Phone number credits carry per-unit overage charges ($0.35 each) once monthly limits are exceeded.
Team plan pricing is custom and requires a 3+ user minimum.
Founding year, headquarters, and company size are not disclosed on the site.

faqs.question: How much does Wiza cost?
faqs.answer: Individual plans range from $49/month (Starter) to $199/month (Email + Phone); annual billing lowers the per-month cost.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Wiza?
paragraphs: Wiza is a B2B prospecting tool that finds and verifies work emails and phone numbers in real time, pulling from live data sources rather than a static cache.
It includes a Chrome extension for one-click lookups, Wiza Prospect for bulk searching across a stated 850M+ records, and Wiza Monitor for job-change alerts.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Wiza is for
paragraphs: Wiza is aimed at sales reps, recruiters, and marketers who need verified contact data for individual or bulk outreach lists.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Kaspr?
paragraphs: Kaspr is a contact-data platform that surfaces verified phone numbers and email addresses for sales and recruiting, primarily through a LinkedIn Chrome extension.
It claims access to over 500 million verified phone numbers and emails from 150+ sources, with bulk enrichment and CRM/API integrations on paid plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Kaspr is for
paragraphs: Kaspr targets sales teams, recruiters, and founders who prospect on LinkedIn and need verified direct-dial and email contact data.

All paid plans include unlimited team members.
cons: Higher email-sequence recipient limits and more connected inboxes require upper tiers (Growth/Scale).

Enterprise plan pricing is custom/quote-only.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Hunter?
paragraphs: Hunter is an email outreach platform that helps users find, verify, and email business contacts through Domain Search, Email Finder, and Email Verifier tools.
Founded in 2015, it also offers Email Sequences for scaled cold outreach and an AI Writing Assistant on paid plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Hunter is for
paragraphs: Hunter is built for sales professionals, business development teams, and marketers running B2B lead generation and cold email campaigns.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Lusha?
paragraphs: Lusha is a B2B data and intelligence platform used by go-to-market teams to find verified emails, direct phone numbers, and firmographic and technographic data on prospects and companies.

Beyond raw contact data, Lusha layers in buying signals such as ICP scoring, lookalike account identification, and website visitor intelligence, and it connects directly to CRMs, automation tools, and AI assistants via MCP.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Lusha is for
paragraphs: Lusha is built for sales development reps, business development teams, and GTM organizations that need accurate contact data for prospecting, ABM campaigns, and CRM enrichment, with a free tier for individuals getting started.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Cognism?
paragraphs: Cognism is a B2B sales intelligence platform that provides phone-verified contact data, intent and hiring/funding signals, and CRM enrichment for revenue teams, with particular strength in European markets.

It also offers a Data-as-a-Service option, delivering verified B2B data via API or batch export, and runs data through an AI-driven fusion engine plus compliance screening (DNC/TPS) before it reaches sales teams.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Cognism is for
paragraphs: Cognism targets enterprise and mid-market sales, marketing, and revenue operations teams in B2B markets, with the site noting teams of 5 or more salespeople tend to see the most value; all pricing is quote-based.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is LeadIQ?
paragraphs: LeadIQ is a B2B prospecting platform that lets sales teams capture, enrich, and sync leads to their CRM directly from the browser, with a native Salesforce managed package and HubSpot integration via Workato.

Its Champion Tracking feature alerts reps when past contacts change jobs, while AI Account Prospecting and the Lando Agent (Enterprise-only) use AI to surface ideal-fit accounts and combine first- and third-party data.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who LeadIQ is for
paragraphs: LeadIQ is aimed at sales development reps and revenue teams focused on pipeline generation, with a free tier for individuals and credit-based paid plans for teams that need higher volume.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ZoomInfo?
paragraphs: ZoomInfo, founded in 2007 (originally as DiscoverOrg and rebranded after acquiring Zoom Information, Inc. in 2019), is a go-to-market platform headquartered in Vancouver, Washington, and publicly traded on the Nasdaq under the ticker GTM.

The platform provides verified B2B contact and company data, buying-intent signals, and add-on modules such as Chorus for conversation intelligence and Copilot for AI-powered prospecting, integrating with CRM and sales engagement tools.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Seamless.AI?
paragraphs: Seamless.AI describes itself as a real-time search engine that helps B2B companies find verified emails and phone numbers, drawing on a database of 1.8B+ emails and 414M+ phone numbers with 100+ live data points per profile.

Beyond data lookup, it includes buyer intent signals, job-change tracking, CRM enrichment, and an Engagement Hub for multi-channel outreach, plus AI agent features for automating outbound and other workflows on paid plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Attio?

Paid tiers add Call Intelligence for recording and analyzing meetings, along with real-time reporting for pipeline and revenue forecasting, and the product integrates with tools like Claude, Slack, Notion, and Stripe via API, SDK, and MCP.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Streak?
paragraphs: Streak, founded in 2011, is a CRM built directly into Gmail, letting users track deals, log emails, and manage follow-ups without leaving their inbox, using a Chrome, Safari, or Edge browser extension.

Paid plans add AI-assisted data entry, advanced reporting, and integrations, while a set of email power tools (tracking, snippets, and mail merge up to 50/day) remain free without a paid subscription.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Streak is for
paragraphs: Streak is used by sales teams, real estate professionals, venture capital firms, and small businesses that want CRM functionality inside Gmail rather than a separate application.

It includes a native MCP server for connecting to AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor, plus CSV/API data import and export for large datasets.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Pipeline CRM?

long_form_blocks.heading: What is noCRM.io?

use_cases.title: In-app purchase infrastructure

pricing_plans.price: Free up to $2,500 MTR, then 1% of tracked revenue

long_form_blocks.heading: What is RevenueCat?
paragraphs: RevenueCat is a subscription backend that handles in-app purchase infrastructure so mobile teams don't have to build receipt validation and entitlement logic themselves across StoreKit, Google Play, and web.
On top of the backend, it adds paywall templates, A/B testing, and customer analytics used to track and grow subscription revenue.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who RevenueCat is for
paragraphs: It serves engineering, product, marketing, support, and data teams at companies that monetize apps through in-app subscriptions.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ChartMogul?
paragraphs: ChartMogul is subscription analytics software used by over 3,000 SaaS companies to track recurring revenue metrics like MRR, ARR, churn, and LTV in one dashboard.

It pulls data from multiple billing systems and payment providers, handles complex billing scenarios like usage-based overages and multi-currency revenue, and layers in forecasting and industry benchmarks.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ChartMogul is for
paragraphs: It's built for SaaS founders and operators who need consolidated, real-time visibility into subscription revenue across one or more billing systems.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Maxio?
paragraphs: Maxio is a billing and financial reporting platform for B2B SaaS and AI companies. It automates subscription billing, contract management, invoicing, and revenue recognition compliant with GAAP and IFRS.
It also includes CPQ functionality, dunning automation for accounts receivable, and customizable reporting dashboards with drill-down capability.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Encharge?
paragraphs: Encharge is marketing automation software built for B2B SaaS companies. Its Flow Builder lets teams create automated journeys triggered by user behavior, such as product usage or inactivity.
It layers in segmentation by product behavior and third-party data, an HTML-free email editor, A/B testing, and account-based features like company profiles and lead scoring.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Encharge is for

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Userlist?
paragraphs: Userlist is an email marketing automation platform built specifically for SaaS companies. It lets teams build visual, multi-step customer journeys that combine lifecycle email, transactional email, and in-app messages.
Unlike generic email tools, Userlist models many-to-many relationships between users and companies, so messaging can be targeted at the account level rather than just individual contacts.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Userlist is for
paragraphs: Userlist is aimed at growing B2B SaaS companies that need behavior-driven onboarding, retention, and upsell messaging tied to product usage data.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Loops?
paragraphs: Loops is an email platform for SaaS companies that combines product, marketing, and transactional email in a single tool, using contact-based rather than send-based pricing.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Postmark?

long_form_blocks.heading: What is PushEngage?
paragraphs: PushEngage is a multichannel push notification platform covering web push, mobile app push, WhatsApp Business, and chat widgets.
A free plan supports up to 200 subscribers, and paid plans starting at $14/month add higher subscriber limits, unlimited campaigns, and ecommerce automation like cart abandonment recovery.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who PushEngage is for

faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day trial for $1 that includes 5,000 one-time credits across all features.

faqs.question: What happens after the trial ends?
faqs.answer: Accounts convert to pay-as-you-go pricing unless the user subscribes to a paid plan; there are no automatic charges.

faqs.answer: It integrates with Google Search Console and WordPress.

faqs.answer: The Basic plan is $58/month with 10,000 monthly credits, and the Professional plan is $99/month with 20,000 monthly credits; Enterprise pricing is custom.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Keyword Insights?
paragraphs: Keyword Insights is an SEO platform that turns keyword research into an organized content strategy by clustering keywords into topics and generating AI content briefs.

It pulls keyword ideas from sources like Google Autocomplete, Reddit, Quora, and People Also Asked, then applies search intent analysis and AI writing assistance to help teams build topical authority.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Keyword Insights is for
paragraphs: The tool is built for SEO agencies, content strategists, and brands trying to establish topical authority in Google and AI search results.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Keysearch is for

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?

faqs.question: What's the difference between Desktop and Cloud?
faqs.answer: Desktop is a locally-installed app (Lite up to 10,000 URLs, Pro up to 500,000 URLs); Cloud removes project limits and runs automated recurring crawls.

faqs.answer: Yes, JavaScript crawling is included at no extra cost on all plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Sitebulb?
paragraphs: Sitebulb is a website crawler built for technical SEO audits, available as a downloadable desktop app or a cloud-based platform. It runs 300+ automated checks per crawl and explains each issue with prioritized 'Hints'.
Desktop plans crawl up to 500,000 URLs per audit, while Cloud removes project limits and can handle up to 10 million URLs with automated recurring crawls.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Sitebulb is for
paragraphs: It suits digital agencies producing client-ready PDF audits, freelance SEOs who want a one-time desktop license, and larger teams that need Cloud-based recurring crawls at enterprise scale.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Oncrawl?
paragraphs: Oncrawl is a cloud-based technical SEO platform that pairs a JavaScript-rendering web crawler with a log file analyzer, giving teams a combined view of crawlability and how search engine bots actually behave on their site.
The platform emphasizes unsampled data processing and offers a full REST API plus pre-built analysis 'Lenses,' including one focused on AI search.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Oncrawl is for
paragraphs: It's aimed at enterprise SEO teams, agencies, and large e-commerce or media sites that need to diagnose technical issues across complex, high-volume websites using both crawl and server log data.

faqs.answer: Enterprise and growth companies, particularly in retail and e-commerce, including Farfetch, Etsy, and Macy's.

faqs.question: Does Botify help with AI search visibility?
faqs.answer: Yes, its AI Visibility and AI Readiness tools are built for optimizing presence in AI agents and chatbots, not just traditional search engines.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Botify?
paragraphs: Botify is an AI search optimization platform aimed at helping enterprises become visible to both traditional search engines and AI agents/chatbots. It's organized around three pillars: AI Readiness, AI Visibility, and AI Activation.
Notable customers include Farfetch, Etsy, Macy's, Ralph Lauren, L'Occitane, and Crocs, and the platform holds Google and Microsoft Bing partner status.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Botify is for
paragraphs: It's built for enterprise and growth-stage companies, particularly in retail and e-commerce, that need to manage AI and search visibility across large product catalogs and complex sites.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Lumar?
paragraphs: Lumar, formerly known as DeepCrawl, is an enterprise website optimization platform built around four apps — Analyze, Monitor, Protect, and Impact — that cover technical SEO, AI search visibility (GEO/AEO), site speed, and web accessibility.
It's SOC 2 Type 2 certified and includes 250+ built-in reports, an API for custom development, and access to a professional services team.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Lumar is for
paragraphs: Lumar targets enterprise organizations and agencies — customers cited on the site include Adobe, Deloitte, Comcast, and Fandom — that need to manage technical SEO, AI visibility, speed, and accessibility across large, complex websites.

Paid Premium and Agency plans add more projects, larger crawl limits, backlink and uptime monitoring, and white-label PDF reporting, backed by a 14-day free trial.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Seobility is for

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Rank Math?
paragraphs: Rank Math is a WordPress SEO plugin that handles on-page analysis, schema markup, XML sitemaps, and keyword rank tracking directly inside the WordPress dashboard. A free version is available for download, with PRO, Business, and Agency tiers unlocking higher keyword and site limits.
It has more than 4 million active installs and a 4.8/5 rating from over 7,461 reviews on WordPress.org.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Rank Math is for

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Yoast SEO?
paragraphs: Yoast SEO is an SEO plugin, originally built for WordPress, that gives real-time feedback on content readability and on-page optimization while automating technical SEO tasks like redirects and internal linking.

Beyond the core WordPress plugin, Yoast offers add-ons for WooCommerce, Shopify, and Google Docs, plus optional Local, News, and Video SEO modules and an AI+ tier for AI-generated metadata and brand monitoring.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Yoast SEO is for
paragraphs: Yoast SEO suits WordPress site owners, bloggers, and WooCommerce or Shopify merchants who want guided on-page SEO without manually managing technical details like redirects and schema.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is All in One SEO?
paragraphs: All in One SEO (AIOSEO) is a WordPress plugin that combines on-page optimization (TruSEO checklists), automated technical SEO (sitemaps, schema, 404 handling), and an AI Assistant for content and image generation.
Paid tiers scale from a single site up to 100 sites, adding features like Link Assistant, advanced redirects, and client management as you move up.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who AIOSEO is for
paragraphs: AIOSEO fits WordPress site owners and agencies who want an all-in-one SEO plugin covering on-page checks, technical SEO automation, and AI-assisted content, without needing separate tools.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is LinkWhisper?

faqs.question: Does Pallyy have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan with 15 posts/month and 1 social account.

faqs.question: Where is Pallyy based?
faqs.answer: Australia, operated by Pallyy PTY LTD.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, users can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime without penalty.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Pallyy?
paragraphs: Pallyy, founded in 2019 in Australia, is a social media management tool offering a content calendar, approval workflows, a unified inbox, and link-in-bio pages.
It supports 10 networks and includes a free plan alongside paid tiers for agencies and larger teams.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Pallyy is for
paragraphs: It fits small businesses and solo users on the free plan, and agencies and brands needing approval workflows and multiple social sets on paid tiers.

enrichment.short_description: AI marketing platform that generates ad creatives, videos, and social content from prompts or product links, and schedules posts.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Predis.ai generates AI ad creatives, videos, and social posts from text or product links, with scheduling and analytics.

features.title: AI ad generation
features.description: Create static creatives, video ads, UGC-style content, and bulk variations from a prompt, product link, or image.

features.title: Multi-platform support
features.description: Publish and schedule across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Pinterest.

features.title: Content calendar
features.description: Schedule posts with approval workflows and auto-posting on Rise and Enterprise+ plans.

features.title: Brand workspaces
features.description: Manage multiple brands with consistent brand application, up to unlimited on Enterprise+.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Track performance and ROAS across campaigns.

features.title: Editing suite
features.description: Built-in editor with automatic resizing for different platform specs.

features.title: Multilingual output
features.description: Generate ad content in 19+ languages.

pros: Generates video and static ads from a single prompt or product link
Multi-brand workspace support on higher tiers
Shopify and 60+ channel integrations plus API access on every plan
Large user base (6.4M+) and strong review ratings across G2, Trustpilot, and Shopify
cons: Core plan has no auto-posting included
Credit-based system limits monthly generation volume
Enterprise+ tier is priced at $212/month

faqs.question: Does Predis.ai include auto-posting?
faqs.answer: Only on the Rise and Enterprise+ plans (2-3 auto posts/day per brand); the Core plan has no auto posting.

faqs.question: What AI models does Predis.ai use?
faqs.answer: Google's Veo, Nano Banana Pro, Minimax, Gemini, and ByteDance's Seedance, combined with proprietary models.

faqs.question: Does Predis.ai have an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, API access is included on all plans.

faqs.question: How many languages does Predis.ai support?
faqs.answer: 19+ languages for generated content.

use_cases.title: Ad creative generation from product links
use_cases.description: Turn a product URL into ready-to-use ad creatives and videos.

use_cases.title: Bulk ad variation production
use_cases.description: Generate multiple ad variations across brands for client campaigns.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Predis.ai?
paragraphs: Predis.ai is an AI marketing platform that generates advertising creatives, video ads, and social posts from text prompts, product links, or images, then lets users schedule and publish them across multiple platforms.
It includes brand workspaces, an editing suite, competitor analysis, and API access with Shopify and 60+ channel integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Predis.ai is for
paragraphs: It's used by e-commerce store owners, content creators, and digital agencies that need to quickly produce ad creatives and social content without a dedicated design team.
